notices.title: 2026 Advanced Level Examination Schedule Released
notices.content: The final examination schedule for Advanced Level students (2026) has been officially published. All A/L students are required to check the notice board for their individual timetables. Exam preparation classes will continue every Saturday.

notices.title: Annual Sports Meet 2026 - Registration Open
notices.content: The Annual Inter-House Sports Meet will be held on April 15th, 2026, at the school ground. All students from grades 6-13 are encouraged to participate. Registration forms are available at the sports office.

notices.title: Parent-Teacher Meeting - First Term 2026
notices.content: Monthly parent-teacher meeting for the first term will be held on April 5th, 2026, at 2:00 PM in the school auditorium. Parents are requested to attend and discuss their children's academic progress with respective class teachers.

notices.title: Science Exhibition 2026 - Call for Projects
notices.content: The annual school Science Exhibition will be held on May 20th. Students interested in showcasing their science projects should submit their proposals to the science department before March 30th.

notices.title: School Library - New Books Arrival
notices.content: The school library has received a new collection of books covering various subjects including literature, science, history, and reference materials. Students are welcome to visit and borrow books during library hours.

notices.title: School Fee Payment Deadline Extended
notices.content: The deadline for second term school fee payment has been extended to April 10th, 2026. Parents can make payments at the school office or through online banking.

notices.title: Cultural Day Celebration - April 2026
notices.content: Join us in celebrating our rich cultural heritage on April 25th. Students are encouraged to participate in traditional dance, music, drama, and art competitions. Registration closes on April 10th.

notices.title: Career Guidance Workshop for A/L Students
notices.content: A career guidance workshop will be conducted on April 12th for all Advanced Level students. University admission procedures, scholarship opportunities, and career pathways will be discussed.

achievements.title: District Champions
achievements.overview: Our school team has secured the district championship in athletics for the third consecutive year. Students participated in various track and field events including 100m sprint, 400m relay, long jump, high jump, and shot put. The team showed exceptional performance with 15 gold medals, 12 silver medals, and 8 bronze medals across all categories.

achievements.title: 95% Pass Rate
achievements.description: Outstanding performance in Advanced Level examinations
